title: selaginella schaffneri
intro: Selaginella schaffneri, also known as Aztec spikemoss, is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella schaffneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
